github_release.summary: Auditovana GitHub/release vrstva pro vytvareni remote repozitaru, release tagu, publish kroku a push workflow mimo bezny workspace scope.

host_runtime_package_install.summary: Auditovana host runtime vrstva pro systemove balicky, apt install, service restarty a dalsi akce mimo repo/workspace hranici.

wider_workspace_runtime.summary: Sirsí auditovana workspace runtime vrstva pro use-cases, kde capability runner ani safe patch nestaci, ale stale nechceme neomezeny shell.

next_workspace_capability.summary: Dalsi pojmenovany capability krok pro workspace, kdy je potreba rozsireni nad install/test/build/lint bez slepeho rozsirovani autopilota.

workspace_repo_bootstrap.summary: Auditovana bootstrap vrstva pro zalozeni noveho lokalniho nebo GitHub-backed repository, generovani deploy SSH klice a registraci workspace.

stack_deploy.summary: Auditovany ai-stack deploy flow pro git pull, restart gateway/OpenWebUI a nasledne smoke checky bez potreby ad-hoc root prikazu v chatu.

clarify_or_infer_capability.summary: Nejužší mentoring krok pro nejednoznacne zadani: nejdriv audit, upresneni nebo inference dalsi capability, az pak rozsirovani scope.

install.summary: Pripravi workspace runtime a zavislosti uvnitr izolovaneho kontejneru.

test.summary: Spusti projektove testy nebo nejblizsi auditovany test runner.

build.summary: Sestavi projekt nebo artefakty bez sirokeho host shell pristupu.

lint.summary: Spusti lint nebo obdobnou statickou kontrolu.

verify.summary: Provede sirsi auditovane overeni pripravenosti projektu.

smoke.summary: Zkusi projekt rozbehnout nebo udelat startup smoke bez plneho nasazeni.
